rulings.Case Title: SCARPULLA ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. JAMES R LEWY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 24, 2014, line 11. PLAINTIFF SCARPULLA ASSOCIATE' DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT Plaintiff's demurrer is OVERRRULED, in part, and SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND in part. Plaintiff's demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the following affirmative defenses: 3.d (waiver of notice to quit); 3.f (arbitrary discrimination based on disability); 3.j(6) (failure to make reasonable accommodations); 3.j(3) (estoppel by conduct / and or statements); 3.j(4) (waiver of strict enforcement of covenant stated generally); and 3.j(5)( waiver of strict enforcement of covenant stated specifically). No facts are alleged and it is also impossible to determine whether only one Defendant is disabled or both and whether only one Defendant was discriminated against or both. Furthermore, if only Defendant McCormick has a disability, how did Plaitniff discriminate against Defendant Lewy and why isn't Defendant Lewy able to pay rent on time, even in light of Defendant McCormick's disability. Plaintiff's demurer is OVERRULED as to as to the following affirmative defenses: 3.e (retaliation); 3.g (violation of SF Eviction Control Ordinance); 3.j (1) (breach of warranty of habitability). = (501/REQ)
